narrative:
Green Twp/Vil (precinct in Harrison County) has 1,138 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.1 percentage points.
